    I

    InjectedDemo - Record Class in com.embabel.template.injected
    Demonstrates injecting Embabel's Ai interface into a regular Spring component.
    InjectedDemo(Ai) - Constructor for record class com.embabel.template.injected.InjectedDemo
    Creates an instance of a InjectedDemo record class.
    InjectedDemo.Animal - Record Class in com.embabel.template.injected
    Domain object for a fictional animal, demonstrating JSR-380 validation on LLM output.
    inventAnimal() - Method in record class com.embabel.template.injected.InjectedDemo
    Invents a fictional animal using the Embabel Creating fluent API.

    W

    WriteAndReviewAgent - Class in com.embabel.template.agent
    An Embabel agent that generates a creative story and then reviews it.
    WriteAndReviewAgent.ReviewedStory - Record Class in com.embabel.template.agent
    Domain object representing the final output: a story with its review.
    WriteAndReviewAgent.Story - Record Class in com.embabel.template.agent
    Domain object representing a generated story.
